== We Value ==
* [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Good_faith Good faith] arguments
* Avoiding [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_fallacies logical fallacies]
* Avoiding [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ad_hominem ad hominem] attacks
* Awareness of [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_cognitive_biases cognitive bias]
* Prioritizing [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/First_principle first principles] thinking
* When in doubt, use the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Socratic_method Socratic Method]

== Independent Thinking ==
We're interested in finding people who are negative on these scales. How easily would you fall for these traps?
* [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Asch_conformity_experiments Asch Conformity Experiments]
* [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Milgram_experiment Milgram Experiment]
* [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stanford_prison_experiment Stanford Prison Experiment]
[[Category:Community]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
